downstreamBlockers.message: The accepted spacing profile is evidence-only; Core document composition does not yet consume inter-root gaps.
Fresh section boundaries and natural body heights require at least 17 pages before spacing or repeated headers, exceeding the 12-page target.
Footer height is reserved, but generated page-number text still lacks final line measurement.
Capacity inputs are ready, but root placement, table row splitting, repeated headers, and page assignment have not run.
